    U

    unavailableSeats - Variable in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.AddEvent
     
    UnavailableSeats_ListView - Variable in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.AddEvent
     
    updateBookingStatus(int, String) - Static method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.database.DatabaseConnection
    Updates a booking's status to the given status string
    updateCalendar() - Method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.Calendar
    Draws all the buttons for each day of the current month shown in the Calendar Fetches all bookings from the database and colours the buttons depending on venue availability
    updateCapacity() - Method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.AddEvent
    Updates the capacity value of the venue as well as the label displaying it
    updateClient(Connection, int, Client) - Static method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.database.DatabaseConnection
    Updates the details of the given Client to its new details
    updateDiaryPreviewPanel() - Method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.Calendar
    Gets the notes from AppData and loads them into the preview screen
    UpdateList() - Method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.AddEvent
    Populates the selected list with the seat numbers that have been selected
    updateListButton - Variable in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.AddEvent
     
    upsertClient(Connection, Client) - Static method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.database.DatabaseConnection
    Updates or inserts the Client table in the database depending on if their details already existed or not
    UsageChart - Class in com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations
    Screen Controller for the Usage Chart Shows the user events within a 3-week timeframe, showing information about each event through clickable, coloured bars
    UsageChart() - Constructor for class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.UsageChart
     
    UsageChart() - Method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.MainMenu
     
    UsageChart.ClickableBar - Class in com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations
    Helper class to make event bars clickable
